default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss HeyGen's content strategy, progress, and upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content strategy split between editorial and programmatic SEO, with flexibility based on priorities](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [New focus on creating 30 use case content suites, including landing pages, blog posts, and demo videos](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [Potential new content areas: agency directories, video marketing agencies, and generative marketing](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
  - [Technical issues with tools directory hyperlinks and image selection to be resolved](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

## Topics

### Team Structure and Content Strategy

  - [GrowthX Labs team working alongside Holly and Nav for several months](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)
  - [Two main work streams: editorial content and programmatic SEO](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)
  - [Fatima and Mariana lead day-to-day content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Jimmy provides growth-related insights (backlinks, internal links)](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Weekly calls cover topics from previous week, upcoming plans, and performance metrics](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
  - [Notion docs used for meeting notes, Airtable for content calendars and tracking](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)

### Content Split and Flexibility

  - [No fixed percentage split between artisanal and programmatic content](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [Team aims to meet weekly and monthly targets](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [Flexible approach allows for 100% focus on one area or 50/50 split as needed](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [Encourages clients to push for new ideas and workflows](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### New Content Initiatives

  - [Use cases: Top priority from Josh, awaiting input on top 30 use cases](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [Tools SEO pages: Ongoing initiative for new AI capabilities and features](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Content repurpose workflows: Converting event recordings into various content formats](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [Agency directories: Potential to create SEO pages for non-featured agencies](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [SEO glossary: Under consideration, but skepticism about being too informational](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [Localization: Potential area to explore, inspired by EI Studios' success](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [Blog to video: Leveraging HeyGen's video API for agent-on-agent use cases](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)

### Ongoing Projects and Updates

  - [Continuing work on blogs for marketing and L\&D audiences](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [Anna (new demand marketer) creating separate campaigns for L\&D and marketing](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
  - [Planning to create landing pages, blog posts, demo videos, and case studies for each use case](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [Exploring top-of-funnel content around generative marketing](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
  - [Technical issues with Biser's absence affecting number updates](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)

### Content Creation Challenges

  - [Hyperlink issues in the tools directory section](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)
  - [Discussion on using stock images vs. programmatic images for use cases](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Need for icon images for each tool](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)

### E-book and Blog Strategy

  - [Extracting 5 article ideas from the e-learning e-book](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
  - [Planning to embed e-book links in blog content](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
  - [Similar approach planned for upcoming marketing e-book](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)

### Content Gap Analysis

  - [Stewart working on collating a large set of keywords](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
  - [Some themes may not have direct product matches but could still be viable content opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)

### SEO Page Refreshes

  - [Identified text-to-video page as a key refresh opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
  - [Other pages (voice cloning, face swap API, AI voices) may need more extensive updates](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Create a thread with Yuri, Shawl, and Fatima to resolve hyperlink issues in tools directory](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)
  - [Follow up on programmatic vs. stock image decision for use cases](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)
  - [Provide icon images for each tool](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
  - [Mariana to develop 5 blog posts based on e-learning e-book content](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
  - [Await confirmation on refreshing the face swap API page](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
  - [GrowthX to consider incorporating text-to-video page refresh into workflow](https://fathom.video/share/zZrFS-zGCqt7Y1WteV753nzJpH9qRUT8?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)

action_items.description: Create thread with Yuri, Shawl, and Fatima to unblock hyperlink issue in tools directory use cases section
Follow up with Fatima on approach for programmatic images for use cases/tools (23+ tools, 3 images each)
Provide icon images for each tool in tools directory
Extract 5 article ideas from e-learning ebook, develop blog posts embedding ebook link to community
Share C media bottom of funnel checklist doc with team
Explore refreshing text-to-video page content using AirOps workflows based on recent docs
Confirm with Alec about refreshing Facebook API page content
